name: tribocrm-extension
description: TriboCRM — Extensão Chrome pro WhatsApp Web

scripts.build: vite build --mode production && vite build -c vite.config.whatsapp.ts --mode production && vite build -c vite.config.crm-bridge.ts --mode production && node scripts/patch-manifest.mjs && node scripts/verify-no-mocks.mjs
